source.title: Duoduo Maicai User Satisfaction and Instant Retail Transformation (2025-2026)

extractions.claim: Duoduo Maicai GMV surged 340% YoY in July 2025 after Meituan Youxuan exited, but experienced negative growth in 2024 and H1 2025
extractions.evidence: 美团优选退出后，多多买菜7月GMV同比增长340%，环比增长30%。但此前2024年和2025年上半年均为负增长。

verification.verifier_notes: Growth driven by competitor exit, not organic improvement. Sustainability questionable.

extractions.claim: Duoduo Maicai's key customer satisfaction weakness is delivery speed: only 'next-day delivery' vs Meituan/Ele.me/JD '30-minute delivery'
extractions.evidence: 拼多多在配送方面有明显短板。即时零售需要'分钟级配送'能力，但拼多多长期依赖第三方物流，多多买菜只能做到'次日达'，远落后于美团、饿了么、京东的'30分钟达'

verification.verifier_notes: Next-day vs 30-minute is a massive gap. PDD is building front-end warehouses to close it.

extractions.claim: PDD is building 200 instant retail warehouses in Shanghai with 30-min delivery, planned launch in first-tier cities by Aug 2025; break-even target 2026
extractions.evidence: 拼多多在上海建设200个即时零售仓库，计划在上海、广州、深圳等一线城市推出即时配送服务。多多买菜预计2026年实现盈亏平衡。

verification.verifier_notes: From multiple Chinese media reports citing industry sources. Execution status unclear as of March 2026.

extractions.claim: Duoduo Maicai 2024 total transaction volume exceeded RMB 20 billion, but PDD has RMB 364.5B in cash to invest
extractions.evidence: 2024年多多买菜总交易额超200亿元。拼多多2025年Q1财报显示现金及现金等价物和短期投资合计3645亿元。

verification.verifier_notes: GMV small relative to PDD's main platform. Cash position provides ample runway for investment.
